parsed.production_notes: The presenter exhibits uncanny, overly smooth facial movements and static body posture typical of AI avatars, with a perfectly still background. The illustrations of the animals have inconsistent anatomy and a distinct AI-generated aesthetic. The tapping finger is a digital overlay.

characters.appearance: Older woman with a slim build and fair complexion. She has long, wavy gray hair and wears black-rimmed glasses. She has extensive tattoos on her neck and chest.

scenes.setting: Urban street doorway, daytime, neutral colors.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A stands outdoors in front of a dark, weathered wooden doorway and a brick wall. She faces the camera directly. The lighting is natural and even.

scenes.visual_description: The screen is split horizontally. The top half shows Character A speaking directly to the camera. The bottom half displays a block of English text. A headline banner runs across the very top of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: Lee libros en inglés durante diez minutos al día. [Read books in English for ten minutes a day.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
LEE LIBROS EN INGLÉS DURANTE 10 MINUTOS AL DÍA
"All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others." - one of them read slowly.
The animals stood silent in the cold night, staring at the wall. They tried to remember the old words, but something felt wrong. No one spoke. The farm looked the same as always, yet nothing was the same anymore.

panels.panel_visual_description: A grayscale illustration of various farm animals gathered together. A large pig stands prominently on a wooden crate in the center. Horses and sheep surround the pig, looking forward. The background features wooden fences and barn structures.

scenes.visual_description: The screen remains split horizontally. The top half now shows a grayscale illustration of farm animals. The bottom half continues to display the English text. A digital finger overlay taps on specific words in the text, triggering pop-up translation cards.
